summary: Markets exhibit mixed sentiment with bullish views on Bitcoin and crude oil amid range breakouts and support levels, while gold and silver face bearish pressures from trend breakdowns and USD strength. Forex pairs lean bullish against the USD, but central bank decisions this week introduce volatility risks. Overall mood is neutral-to-bullish in crypto and commodities, cautious in metals.
